title: Polling Preparations Intensify in Dharmapuri
summary: District authorities in Dharmapuri have intensified preparations for the upcoming polling day with a focus on ensuring smooth and peaceful elections. Polling booths have been equipped with EVMs, VVPAT machines, drinking water facilities, shaded waiting areas, and ramps for differently-abled voters. Officials conducted inspections across multiple constituencies and coordinated with various departments to finalize logistics. The administration emphasized voter convenience, transparency, and strict adherence to election guidelines.

title: Flying Squads Intensify Cash Checks
summary: Election flying squads and surveillance teams have increased vehicle checks across Dharmapuri district to prevent illegal cash distribution. Several suspicious vehicles were intercepted and unaccounted cash was seized during inspections. Authorities warned that strict legal action will be taken against individuals involved in electoral malpractice and urged citizens to report suspicious activities.

title: Campaigning Ends with Local Rallies
summary: Political parties concluded their campaigns with rallies, public meetings, and door-to-door outreach programs across Dharmapuri. Candidates highlighted local issues such as water scarcity, agriculture, and employment. The final phase of campaigning witnessed increased public engagement before the enforcement of the silence period.

title: Security Tightened Across Sensitive Areas
summary: Police and central forces have been deployed in sensitive areas across Dharmapuri to maintain law and order during the election period. Checkposts have been strengthened, and surveillance has been increased through patrols and monitoring systems. Authorities have assured residents of a safe environment during polling.

title: Transport Arrangements for Poll Staff
summary: Special buses and vehicles have been arranged to transport polling officials and security personnel to designated polling booths across rural and urban areas of Dharmapuri.

title: Medical Teams Deployed in Polling Areas
summary: Healthcare teams and ambulances have been deployed near polling stations to handle medical emergencies, especially heat-related illnesses. Authorities advised voters to stay hydrated and take precautions.

title: Heat Conditions Affect Rural Areas
summary: Dharmapuri continues to experience high temperatures, impacting daily activities and election preparations. Officials advised early voting to avoid peak heat hours.

title: Voter Awareness Campaigns Continue
summary: Authorities conducted awareness drives in villages and towns to encourage maximum voter participation, especially among first-time voters.

title: Mock Polls Conducted Successfully
summary: Election officials conducted mock polling exercises to ensure EVM functionality and preparedness across all booths.

title: Illegal Liquor Seized During Raids
summary: Police seized illegal liquor during raids conducted in rural areas to prevent distribution ahead of polling.

title: Night Patrols Increased in Villages
summary: Police intensified night patrols in rural pockets to prevent disturbances and illegal activities before polling.

title: Farmers Continue Summer Crop Activities
summary: Despite election activities, farmers continued irrigation and maintenance of summer crops across the district.

title: Village Roads Cleaned Ahead of Polling
summary: Local bodies carried out cleaning drives and minor repairs on village roads leading to polling booths.

title: Local Markets See Reduced Footfall
summary: Weekly markets reported lower attendance as people focused on election-related activities.

title: Emergency Services on Alert
summary: Emergency response teams were placed on standby across the district.

title: Schools Declared Holiday
summary: Schools were closed as many buildings are used as polling stations.

summary: Residents stocked groceries and essentials ahead of polling day.
